name: Partially my fault in work accident - still get benefits?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault in work accident - still get benefits?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers comp no-fault system covers regardless.[2] Context: Fault irrelevant for employer claim.[2] Key factors: Work-relatedness only. Practical guidance: Don't volunteer blame; focus on injury proof. Full benefits apply. Third-party comparative fault matters.[1]
